introSection: Polar Coaster is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Story Land in Glen, New Hampshire, USA.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The roller coaster is built on a gentle gradient and has several switchbacks and a helix. The station is located inside an artificial ice cave with penguins and snowmen.

fullText:
Polar Coaster is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Story Land in Glen, New Hampshire, USA.

The roller coaster is built on a gentle gradient and has several switchbacks and a helix. The station is located inside an artificial ice cave with penguins and snowmen.
